_comment: Committed null schema for the task register (P35). Real tasks live in pipeline/user-context/task-register.local.json (gitignored; stays on the creator's machine or in the configured store backend). This file defines the shape only. Dates and derived flags are computed offline by tools/tasks.py; the task-extract atom supplies rows; history[] is the append-only source of truth. Organizational tracking only, never legal, financial, or compliance advice.
_boundary: ORGANIZATIONAL TRACKING, NOT LEGAL, FINANCIAL, OR COMPLIANCE ADVICE. Verify dates and tasks against the contract and counterparty. Nothing is sent, filed, invoiced, or posted automatically.

tasks.status: not_started | in_progress | waiting_external | blocked | deferred | done | cancelled
